  as={"h1"}

  children={"Play a VRMA animation on a persona's VRM."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/personas/{id}/vrm/vrma/play"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Play a VRMA animation on a persona's VRM.
